scripts.build:
node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const checkEnv = (p) => { try { const content = fs.readFileSync(p, 'utf8'); const lines = content.split('
'); console.log(p + ' keys:', lines.map(l => l.split('=')[0])); const pLine = lines.find(l => l.trim().startsWith('SEARCH_PROVIDER=')); if (pLine) console.log(p + ' SEARCH_PROVIDER:', pLine.split('=')[1].trim()); } catch(e) { console.log(p + ' error:', e.message); } }; checkEnv('../../.env'); checkEnv('../../current/server/.env'); checkEnv('server/.env');" && vite build
